message:
🐛 Wait for backend health before showing refresh link

After kc-agent reconnects during a restart, the Go backend may still
be building (~45s). Previously the "Refresh" link appeared immediately,
leading to ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED if clicked too early.

Now: polls /health every 2s (up to 60s) before transitioning to "done".
Shows "Waiting for backend to come up..." during the wait.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
